---
name: New Content Proposal
about: Propose a new section, game, or question for the book
title: "[Content] "
labels: content-proposal
---

### Chapter
Which chapter does this belong to? (1-6, or "new chapter")

### Content type
- [ ] Section (educational content)
- [ ] Game (interactive mini-game)
- [ ] Question (quiz/choice)

### Title
<!-- Short, kid-friendly title -->

### Description
<!-- What will the reader learn? Why is this needed? -->

### Target voice (if applicable)
- [ ] Universal (everyone)
- [ ] Explorer (show me how it works)
- [ ] Creator (let me build something)
- [ ] Thinker (explain why)

### Core or detailed?
- [ ] Core (essential, required for certificate)
- [ ] Detailed (enrichment, nice to read)
